title: <div>Got it — here’s a super sparse version, written exactly how you’d text some
content:
Got it — here’s a super sparse version, written exactly how you’d text someone like John without sounding like it came from AI:
⸻
Text to John:
$25/week can’t work.
Meta needs 50 leads/week to get out of learning.
Even at $10/lead, that’s $500/week.
We’re getting 1–2 leads/week max right now.
Every time we pause, it resets learning.
It’ll never stabilize at this spend.
Best move is to pause FB for now.
Let’s push the $25 into Google Search.
People there are already looking.
Way more efficient at low budget.
If we want FB later, we need at least $100–150/test.
That’s it. Clean plan.
